name: NSFW Level Detector
description: Detects potentially hidden NSFW content in levels. Shows detailed breakdown of suspicion categories for streamers.

auto-scan.name: Auto-Scan on Level Load
auto-scan.description: Automatically scan levels when entering play mode

sensitivity.name: Detection Sensitivity
sensitivity.description: Higher values catch more but may have more false positives (0-100)

warn-threshold.name: Warning Threshold (%)
warn-threshold.description: Show popup warning if any category exceeds this percentage
